programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Two VIPs engage Fredrik in price tag tug-o-war; Luis' client has a big secret.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A bombshell is dropped on Luis; Fredrik learns a hard lesson; Ryan goes to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis travels to Puerto Rico with his New York clients; Fredrik's client pressures him for a high return on a penthouse.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Roddy McDowall guest stars as Leo Ostro, a brilliant crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of the IMF when he launches a mysterious one-hundred-million-dollar scheme.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Choji and Naruto are craving Ichiraku's special ramen only to find out that they find the shop closed! Teuchi reveals that his daughter has been kidnapped by Ryonin, aka the Ninja Chefs, who is after his secret recipes!

programme.desc: The Demon of the Ocean is wreaking havoc in the Land of the Sea. Anko leads a team consisting of Naruto, Ino, and Shino. It turns out Anko has an unexpected history with the Land of the Sea.

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy empieza a ir a una guardería nueva que se parece a una cárcel. Después de imaginarse con otros "prisioneros", Tommy planea escaparse. / Tommy tiene que ir a ver al doctor para que le den una vacuna.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos van a jugar al parque donde los chicos están asustados por un chico malo. / Didi trae un espejo antiguo a casa. Después de investigarlo de cerca, Tommy y Carlos descubren que hay un país del otro lado del espejo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angelica se enamora de un niño de 4 años que usa una chaqueta de cuero. / Mientras se dirigen a la heladería, Hugo y Julio se desvían hacia la cancha de golf donde jugaban cuando eran niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo es golpeado en la cabeza y sufre una amnesia temporal, por lo que empieza a comportarse como un bebé nuevamente. / Los Pickles hacen una venta de garaje, y los Rugrats ayudan reuniendo las cosas de los adultos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras Hugo prueba un nuevo juguete electrónico, accidentalmente corta la electricidad de la ciudad entera. / Los niños confunden un cajero automático de un banco por una de caramelos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica le explica a Tommy que todos los padres regalan a sus hijos a otros padres en las reuniones familiares. / Al cuidado del Abuelo, Tommy y Carlitos se preparan para una excitante noche de películas y helado.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: En el Museo de Historia Natural, Tommy y sus amigos buscan un hueso para Firulais. / Carlitos cree que los animales son más felices en el océano. Cuando le regalan unos peces, emprende la misión de llevarlos de vuelta al mar.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats encuentran una pequeña lagartija y creen que es el bebé de Reptar. / Cuando un juego de adivinanzas se pone demasiado intenso, los Pickles y los DeVilles no se hablan más.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats convencen a Carlitos que él se puede convertir en superhéroe si se pone una capa violeta. / Cuando Firulais empieza a tener olor feo, Didi contrata a un peluquero de perros para que lo bañe.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ver una película de ciencia ficción sobre hormigas gigantes del espacio, Tommy y Carlos quedan asustados. / Inspirados por una película de ciencia ficción, los Rugrats deciden usar un "rayo vago" para convertirse en miniaturas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi conoce al famoso cuidador de niños, el Dr. Lipschitz, y lo invita a cenar a su casa. / Los Rugrats fantasean en cómo sería ser adultos y deciden que es mejor ser bebés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Las familias escapan a las montañas para pasar Navidad. Las vacaciones se tornan peligrosas cuando Tommy y Carlitos ponen trampas para Santa por toda la cabaña y el papá de Carlitos se viste como Santa y trata de bajar por la chimenea.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de escuchar una historia del Abuelo, Tommy sueña con que los extraterrestres lo llevan adentro de una nave espacial. / Cuando el Abuelo pierde a Tommy, decide usar sus técnicas de investigador de los años 30’s para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando un juego de escondidas se pone extraño, Carlitos pierde sus lentes y el mundo le parece como una pesadilla borrosa. / Un zorrillo moja a Carlitos y él se pone más triste que nunca.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando a Tommy le sacan su osito preferido, decide tomar el consejo de Angélica y empieza a portarse mal. / Angélica recibe un juego de magia como regalo. Ella y los Rugrats se sorprenden cuando Angélica hace desaparecer a Lili.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una nueva familia se muda en frente de la casa de Tommy y él inmediatamente se hace amigo de su nueva vecina de tres años, Susie. / Hugo le compra a Tommy un juego para armar, pero los bebés se entretienen más con la caja del juguete.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Angélica les cuenta una historia de terror, Tommy y Carlitos comienzan a tener miedo de irse por el desagüe de la bañera. / Cuando el hermano de Didi se casa, Tommy y Carlitos se obsesionan con el pastel.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos pierden sin querer a Cynthia, la muñeca favorita de Angélica y tienen que decidir si contárselo o no a Angélica. / Carlitos tiene un amigo imaginario que se llama Barney, que nadie puede ver o escuchar, solamente Carlos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats piensan que un camión de basura que pasa todas las semanas es un monstruo que se llama Hubert. / Los Rugrats ven un programa de televisión sobre un perro que habla, y se convencen de que Firulais los está rechazando.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia traumática, Carlitos comienza a temerle a los toboganes. Tommy, Susie, Fili y Lili lo ayudan a superar su miedo. / Los Rugrats van a una piscina pública y la confunden con un inodoro gigante.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras el Abuelo compite en un campeonato de bolos, los Rugrats se van a explorar y descubren que el contrincante del Abuelo está haciendo trampa. / Angélica es castigada por Julio, así que decide dejar su casa e irse a la de Tommy.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi concursa en un juego peligroso de televisión en donde tiene que enfrentar sus propios miedos. / Boris y Minka cuidan a Tommy y Angélica por un fin de semana, pero no se acuerdan bien de sus técnicas de cuidar a niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica salva a Carlitos de ser atropellado por un niño en triciclo, ella decide que Carlitos debe ser su esclavo para siempre. / Los bebés admiran a Susie porque ella siempre los defiende de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica se entera del Hada de los Dientes, planea hacerse rica sacándole los dientes a Carlitos y metiéndolos bajo su propia almohada. / La imaginación de los Rugrats se enciende cuando el Abuelo les lee el cuento de Aladino.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de Randy es invitado a cenar a la casa, los niños piensan que Susie debe mudarse lejos. Fili y Lili deciden que quieren ser diferentes. Fili trata de ser como Carlitos y Lili trata de ser como Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Carlitos le van a cortar el pelo por primera vez, pero él le tiene miedo a los cortes de cabello, por lo que los Rugrats y Chas deciden ayudarlo a superar su miedo. Angélica y Susie son enviadas al mismo campamento.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando el triciclo de Susie se pierde y Angélica aparece montando uno idéntico, Susie la acusa de ser una ladrona. Angélica juega al doctor y le dice a Carlitos que tiene una enfermedad que lo convertirá en un rinoceronte.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El Abuelo comienza a sentir que es una molestia y se muda a una casa de retiro que parecía linda por televisión pero termina siendo aburrida. El Abuelo lleva a los Rugrats de campamento en el patio.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ir al circo, Angélica prepara su propio circo con los Rugrats como los actores. Los Rugrats intentan encontrar un hermanito para Tommy en un huevo abandonado en un nido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his new companion Coby set sail in search of the infamous pirate hunter Zoro, rumored to be held captive at the Marine Base.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy recalls a time when Captain Red-Haired Shanks taught him a valuable lesson in friendship and set him on his quest to be King of the Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy crosses paths with the clever thief Nami. A navigator on a quest to collect one hundred million berries, she’s perfect for Luffy’s new crew – except for the fact that Nami hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Having delivered a deadly blow to Captain Buggy’s pirates, Luffy and his companions need a place to recuperate. But the three are not in hiding very long before the Beast Tamer Mohji seeks them out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A mom starts online dating to try and cope after an unexpected tragedy, but when she gets pulled into the underbelly of the BDSM world and then disappears, investigators spend over a year unraveling this dark mystery.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a man is shot dead in bed right next to his fiancée, detectives learn that anyone's past can come back to haunt them.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young mother is brutally murdered but despite unique evidence at the scene, it takes years to put the pieces together and bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur is shot in his home; there are many suspects but with only suspicion to go on, it takes investigators over seven years to nab his killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Lust and greed are at the core of the case of a wife and mother who is found dead in her pool; investigators are quick to uncover a web of affairs, lies and fraud that lead them to her killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in a hotel stairwell and detectives quickly uncover that she had a secret life that may have led to her demise.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a police officer goes missing, it becomes apparent he is the victim of a jealous wrath.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Three members of a wealthy family are gunned down in their own home; with little evidence to go on, investigators embark on a multi-year surveillance operation to see if they can prove their instincts are correct.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A beloved entrepreneur is murdered in his office; a secret double life is quickly revealed, and despite mountains of suspicion, lies and motives, his killer is not who one would assume.

programme.desc: In the third season premiere, budget cuts are hitting the LAPD hard. Meanwhile, the team investigates the murder of a family, with the prime suspect being the son who survived.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: The body of a long-missing teen gang member turns up with Provenza's business card in his pocket. Meanwhile, Fritz accidentally reveals a secret to Brenda's father.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped in front of her younger brother, Jane and the team race to find the girl. ANNIE WERSCHING (24) guest stars.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The coach of a baseball team is found dead, as the team owners and a star player battle for control of the team. Jane's brother Tommy (COLIN EGGLESFIELD) is released from jail.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura's knowledge of American history becomes important as she and Jane try to solve a killing at a Revolutionary War re-enactment. Maura's mother (JACQUELINE BISSET) visits.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: After a mugging gone wrong, Jane and Maura delve into a family's background. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift with Jane.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The team finds potential mob connections involving Maura's biological father (JOHN DOMAN). Maura spends time with Tommy (COLIN EGGLESFIELD) and Jane evades sensitivity training.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Posing as jewel broker Donnie Brasco, FBI agent Joseph D. Pistone (Johnny Depp) is granted entrance into the violent mob family of aging hit man Lefty Ruggiero (Al Pacino).

programme.title: Thunderheart
programme.desc: Val Kilmer, Sam Shepard and Graham Greene star in this murder mystery filled with style and suspense. Kilmer stars as Ray Levoi, a hotshot FBI agent who's thrust into a strange new world when he is sent to solve a murder on an Indian reservation.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: The Gentlemen
programme.desc: A British drug lord tries to sell off his highly profitable empire to a dynasty of Oklahoma billionaires.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Winona Ryder, Christian Slater, and Shannen Doherty star in this cruelly hilarious dark comedy, which became one of the biggest cult classics of the `80s.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: The public Crawford was strong-willed, glamorous and admirable, but Mommie Dearest reveals the private Crawford, the woman desperate to be a mother, adopting her children when she was single and trying to survive in the devastating movie industry.

programme.title: The Hot Spot
programme.desc: A lowlife drifter who sells used cars in a Texas burg robs the local bank and gets involved with two women: one bad, one innocent. Based on Charles Williams' 1952 novel "Hell Hath No Fury."

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon, Matt Dillon and Neve Campbell star in a steamy story of murder, intrigue and sex. Rated: R

programme.title: Snatch

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story about a single father and his young son. Finding themselves homeless, he risks everything on an unpaid internship in a highly competitive stockbroker training program, where only one in twenty interns make the grade.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt and Cate Blanchett star in the adaption of F. Scott Fitzgerald's story about an elderly man who ages backward and the problems that arise when he falls in love with a woman.

programme.title: Amistad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: On certain evenings, the constellation of Lyra is visible in the skies.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Theseus was the fruit of dual paternity: Aegeus King of Athens slept with Aethra when she had just been raped by Poseidon, God of the Sea.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Taking revenge against Prometheus, Zeus created the first woman - the beautiful Pandora. He gave her a manipulative and deceptive character and subjected Prometheus to terrible torture.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Although they were the son and daughter of Zeus, Apollo and his twin sister Artemis were born under threats from the goddess Hera.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Zeus had a reputation for being a seducer of women. One day he lay with a mortal - Semele, the daughter of the king of Thebes. Their son Dionysus was brought up by nymphs.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Dedalus, a prominent Greek inventor, settled in Crete among King Minos’ court. Queen Pasiphaë, who had an all-consuming passion for a white bull, called upon his services.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Goddess of War Athena was the wisest, most level-headed and rational deity. She was born out of Zeus’ skull, wearing a helmet and holding a spear.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Kronos revolted against his father Uranus. He severed his father’s genitals and threw them into the sea, where they mingled with the foam and gave birth to Aphrodite.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Hermes was the youngest of the Gods of Olympus. Right from birth, he was an insolent, thieving, trickster God.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: In this myth, many versions of which have been passed down through the ages, Psyche is the Beauty.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Bellerophon, the grandson of Sisyphus, one of the Greek world’s worst criminals, dreamt of becoming a hero, of being equal to the Gods.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Perseus was not meant to come into the world. Fearing the fulfillment of the prediction according to which his grandson would kill him, King Acrisius shut his daughter Danaë away in a fortified tower.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: On his quest to find the Golden Fleece, Jason asked the cruel King of Colchis and his daughter Medea, a powerful sorceress, for help.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: We all know about Heracles’ unequaled strength and the twelve labors he had to carry out, but we know a great deal less about the way in which his life was turned upside down by terrible curses.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: No mortal endured more terrible a tragedy than Oedipus. He was the son of King Laius, King of Thebes.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Antigone was one of Oedipus’ four children. She had two brothers, Eteocles and Polynices, as well as a sister, Ismene.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Located in the bowels of the Earth, Tartarus was the prison of the Underworld, the place where fallen Gods and banished heroes ended up.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: A golden apple inscribed 'for the fairest' is sent to a feast at Olympus. Unable to decide between the goddesses Aphrodite, Hera and Athena, Zeus decides to let a mortal choose.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: All of the Greek kings and their armies have responded to Agamemnon's call. All except two, that is, Odysseus and Achilles.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since the Greek forces arrived in Troy, but King Priam's city has still not fallen. The king's eldest son, Hector, reproaches his brother Paris for causing this war with no end.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Agamemnon has seen it in a dream, Troy will be taken today. Helen's husband Menelaus recognizes Paris, the man who took his wife. The two men decide to face each other in a duel.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The chaos that reigns between Greeks and Trojans has now spread to Mount Olympus. Back on the battlefield, the Trojans have driven back the Greeks and decided to build a long wall.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Odysseus and Ajax try to convince Achilles to return to combat, but the Greek warrior rejects their appeals. On the battlefield, Agamemnon, Diomedes and even Odysseus are injured one after the other.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Saved by Apollo, Hector goes back on the attack and leads the Trojans as far as the Greeks' ships. Patroclus, a childhood friend of Achilles, rushes to him and implores him to re-join the battle.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Thetis asks Hephaestus, the god of blacksmiths to forge new armour and weapons for her son Achilles. At dawn, she hands them to him, knowing that they will lead to his death.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The River Scamander and its banks are set alight by fireballs sent by the god Hephaestus. The river god spares Achilles, who immediately goes back on the rampage. The gods are shocked by his rage.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Trojans are surprised to discover that the Greeks have suddenly left the shores of Troy, leaving only a wooden horse. Inside the horse, Greek warriors remain silent and still.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: Only Lovers Left Alive
programme.desc: Driven by sensual photography, trance-like music, and droll humor, Jim Jarmusch’s ONLY LOVERS LEFT ALIVE is a meditation on art, science, and the mysteries of everlasting love.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls (2006)
programme.desc: To Jill Johnson, it was the perfect babysitting job. The parents were away. The fridge was stocked. The children were tucked into bed. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Overlord
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths, an offbeat group of scary movie fans become the target of a masked killer in this smash-hit thriller from legendary director Wes Craven (A NIGHTMARE ON ELM STREET) that breathed new life into the horror genre.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: While away at college, Sidney Prescott thought she'd finally put the terror behind her...until a copycat killer begins acting out a real-life sequel in which no one is safe, or beyond suspicion.

programme.title: Gangs Of New York
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese's epic film set in mid-19th century Lower Manhattan tells the story of a young Irish immigrant (Leonardo DiCaprio) seeking revenge against the rival gang leader who killed his father.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: The early years of larger-than-life American figure Howard Hughes are captured by legendary director Martin Scorsese, in this acclaimed Oscar-winning biopic starring Leonardo DiCaprio and Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: When U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels arrives at the asylum for the criminally insane on Shutter Island, he uncovers terrifying truths about the island and finds out some places never let you go.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Mary Lynn's 14 year-old-son Jacob would rather be in foster care than live with his own mother in her hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Not even losing several inches of her intestine to gangrene has stopped Theresa from hoarding and eating expired food.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Al used to take his three-year-old son dumpster diving, but Child Protective Services recently removed the child from his home. Al's hoarding has become such an eye-sore that he's also facing $2,500 a day in fines by the county.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A teenager's diary reveals the sordid secret behind her murder in Florida.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: An Arkansas community is devastated when a family is found murdered.

programme.desc: Two teenagers are executed in a lover's lane, and over sixty years later technology finally catches up to help track down their mysterious killer.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved
programme.desc: When a young couple is discovered murdered, It will take almost 40 years to uncover the killer of childhood sweethearts.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Danny Rolling, known as the Gainesville Ripper, murdered five university students in Florida in 1990. Rolling also confessed to murdering a family in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Dennis Rader, known to the World as the BTK Killer, killed ten people, including young children, between 1974 and 1991 in Wichita, Kansas.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: A treasure hunter gets lost in the Australian Outback and struggles to survive wild dingoes.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: Four men fight for their lives against the very animals they have dedicated themselves to protect.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: A father and son on a hunting expedition in Kyrgyzstan are caught in a blizzard.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rottweiler In The ER
programme.desc: While a shooting victim is brought to the hospital, a Rottweiler gets loose in the ER; a young mother's asthma attack turns quickly into a deadly heart failure; a young man comes into the ER comatose, covered with a mysterious rash.

programme.desc: A dialysis patient is bleeding and doctors can't get it to stop: a naked man falls into a cactus and is covered head to toe in cactus needles; a patient brings radioactive rocks to the hospital causing chaos in the ER.

programme.title: Technology of War
programme.desc: Future conflicts will be very different from those of the past.

programme.title: Technology of War
programme.desc: In a remote part of the World, an unmanned aircraft flies undetected over a small village, believed to be a terrorist stronghold. Using advanced sensors, the UAV scans the terrain.

programme.title: Technology of War
programme.desc: The sea is calm the. The horizon serene. In the blink of an eye, a massive force of landing craft boats and helicopters appear on horizon at shocking pace. Troops tanks and supplies forge ahead.

programme.title: Technology of War

programme.title: Voices of the Battle of Britain

programme.desc: Economic and cultural issues in the years leading to the war; slavery; John Brown's raid on Harper's Ferry.

programme.title: The American Civil War
programme.desc: The battle of Bull Run, the war at sea, the emergence of Robert E. Lee, and the battle of Antietam.

programme.title: The American Civil War
programme.desc: The Southern army's victory at Chancellorsville; Gen. Stonewall Jackson's death; battle of Gettysburg.

programme.title: The American Civil War

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The Desert Fox becomes outfoxed by the Ultra secret.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The US plan for invading Japan was a secret; new revelations detail manipulated casualty figures and plans to stockpile gas weapons preparing for war.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The American Army was struggling to fight an elusive enemy. Learn about the Viet Cong's methods to hinder America's attempts to seal South Vietnam.

programme.title: Merry Ex-Mas

programme.title: Santa Girl

programme.title: A Frosty Affair
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, a small-town teacher is on her way to the city for her wedding when a blizzard strikes, and she is snowed in. An unlikely adventure with a lumberjack leaves her questioning her future wedding plans.

programme.title: A Prince for Christmas
programme.desc: Wanting to escape an arranged marriage, a European prince flees to the United States. There, he meets a struggling young waitress who may just be his one true love.

programme.title: The Twelve Days of Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Calvin Carter, a successful business executive, has it all but neglects those closest to him. On Christmas Eve, all that changes when the sign on his office building falls on him.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura es interrogada por el Comisario, quien de inmediato se da cuenta que ella está mintiendo al ver la forma en la que se contradice en sus declaraciones.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson's body is swapped with that of an old Goa'uld enemy. As Jackson lies dying in the alien's ancient body, O'Neill and Teal'c accidentally switch forms too, and unless the alien is captured, all will be trapped in their new bodies forever!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1's arch-enemy Apophis is dying and seeks sanctuary with O'Neill. But what he really wants is a new host in exchange for his knowledge of the Goa'uld. Will O'Neill grant his request or send him back to the Goa'uld to face his fate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a routine recon mission, the SG-1 team discovers a new, friendly life form. But the encounter turns deadly for the new race because of a virus SG-1 inadvertently introduces. Can SG-1 develop a vaccine before this plague eradicates a civilization?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A boy mysteriously appears at SGC and pleas for help, claiming the Goa'uld are chasing him to find a race of invisible beings. But the SG-1 team doesn't know that the invisible aliens plan to destroy humanity…and their invasion has already begun!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A solar flare sends the SG-1 team back to 1969, where the U.S. military suspects the team of espionage. O'Neill and his team escape with two Woodstock-bound kids, desperate to find the Stargate before they're stuck in the psychedelic past forever.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill awakens, seemingly from a 79-year cryogenic sleep, to find that his team is long dead. He soon discovers that it's all a setup and he is actually a prisoner of the Goa'uld, who intend to learn all his secrets…and then destroy him!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hathor captures O'Neill and implants him with a destructive Goa'uld symbiote that could eventually kill him. Meanwhile, O'Neill's rescue party is defeated by Hathor's invincible energy barrier and time is running out. Is there a way to save O'Neill?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 hunts for a Goa'uld lord living on Earth, they discover this powerful alien in the form of a religious leader with an armed cult following. O'Neill faces off with both government agents and the cult in a clash that may destroy them all.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: How will a pair of Indy Car racers handle a self-drive in Saint-Tropez, France?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con-man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: In a ghost town, Lucas, Mark and Micah tangle with the Newman family and learn the secret of the town's 20-year-old mystery of a lost gold mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is threatened with hanging by a lynch party when some horses he has purchased in a neighboring town turn out to be stolen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whiskey salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick llega a caballo a Atlanta, donde encuentra una ciudad desolada. Tras escapar de una situación de peligro, Rick se une a un grupo de supervivientes en unos grandes almacenes, donde le espera un enemigo más peligroso que los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick regresa a Atlanta al sentirse culpable de haber dejado a Merle abandonado en un edificio asolado por zombis. En el campamento, la inesperada llegada de Rick causa tensión entre Lori y Shane, quien había asegurado que Rick había muerto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Atlanta, una banda armada sorprende al grupo de Rick mientras están buscando a Merle. Entretanto, en el campamento, Jim empieza a comportarse de forma extraña, tiene premoniciones y asusta a los niños con una tragedia que se aproxima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el ataque al campamento, Rick conduce al grupo hacia el CDC, un recinto de la base sanitaria militar, en el que esperan encontrar un refugio seguro. Durante el trayecto, Jim debe tomar una decisión extremadamente difícil.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un científico inquietante deja entrar a Rick y su grupo en el CDC. No obstante, hay algo extraño y los supervivientes del apocalipsis zombi empiezan a sospechar que no todo es lo que parece en el recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick Grimes, policía de una pequeña localidad de Georgia, despierta de un coma y repentinamente se encuentra en un mundo apocalíptico. Desorientado, en busca de su familia y una explicación a lo acontecido, Rick ha de adaptarse al nuevo orden.
